NAVAREA XIX 98/24
 1. ANDOYA SPACE WILL CONDUCT DAILY LAUNCHES   06 TO 08 AUG 1200-2159 UTC
 MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING DANGER AREA:
  
 NORDMELA
 A. 69-53.0N 013-35.0E
 B. 70-05.0N 014-54.0E
 C. 69-32.0N 015-34.0E
 D. 69-20.0N 014-17.0E

 2. FOR COORDINATION, ANDOEYA SPACE OPERATIONS CENTER CAN BE REACHED ON:
 TELEPHONE +47 94 07 59 44 OR MARITIME VHF CH 14/16 CALLSIGN RANGE SAFETY NORDMELA
